body.title: Rewrite all wild_igor.igor.* imports to devices.igor.*
body.result: Rewrote all wild_igor.igor.* imports to devices.igor.* across devices/igor/, tests/igor/, and lab/claudecode/. Removed 298 duplicate Igor test files from tests/ (now live only in tests/igor/). Removed pytest_ignore_collect safety gate. 935 UU-native tests pass; 44 tests/igor/ collection errors are pre-existing lab.utility_closet not-yet-migrated.
body.description:
After devices/igor/ is populated (T-igor-subtree-import), update every import statement across the entire codebase: `wild_igor.igor` → `devices.igor`, `from wild_igor` → `from devices.igor`, `import wild_igor` → `import devices.igor`. Also update sys.path insertions that reference TheIgors/wild_igor. Also update any string references in JSON config, yaml files, and comments. Igor must remain stopped during this step. Restart Igor from the new location after tests pass.

**Affected files:** All .py files in devices/igor/, lab/claudecode/, tests/igor/, and any remaining TheIgors scripts that reference wild_igor; also pyproject.toml if it references wild_igor
**Design rules:** After this step, zero occurrences of `wild_igor` anywhere in UnseenUniversity repo; devices.igor is the sole import prefix for Igor internals
**Scope boundary:** In scope: import rewrite across both repos. Out of scope: removing wild_igor/ directory from TheIgors (T-igor-theigers-archive). Out of scope: utility_closet removal (T-remove-utility-closet-all).
**Test plan:** `grep -rn 'wild_igor' ~/dev/src/UnseenUniversity/ --include='*.py'` returns zero results. Full test suite `pytest tests/ -x -q` passes. Igor starts cleanly from new location: `tmux new-session -d -s igor igor` and `tmux has-session -t igor` succeeds. `python -c "from devices.igor.main import main"` succeeds.
